title: Bridge Essay: Neural mechanisms underlying the Rubber Hand Illusion: A systematic review of related neurophysiological studies.
concept: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**Neural mechanisms underlying the Rubber Hand Illusion: A systematic review of related neurophysiological studies.** - Brain Behav (2021). DOI: 10.1002/brb3.2124. PMID: 34288558. INTRODUCTION: Many researchers took advantage of the well-established rubber hand illusion (RHI) paradigm to explore the link between the sense of body ownership and the different brain structures and networks. Here, we aimed to review the studies that have investigated this phenomenon by means of neurophysiological techniques. METHODS: The MEDLINE, accessed by Pubmed and EMBASE electronic databases, was searched using the medical subject headings: "Rubber hand illusion" AND "Transcranial magnet
